name: homebridge-raumfeld
description: Control Teufel Raumfeld multiroom speakers from Apple HomeKit, with AirPlay streaming from iOS.
//dependencies-note: Add a UPnP/OpenHome SOAP client (e.g. a small SOAP helper over the Raumfeld host HTTP API on port 47365) and, for AirPlay, an airtunes2 / shairport-sync bridge. Left out here so the implementer can pick the approach.
